name: Adelaide (South Australia, Australia)

colors.symbolism: the central crown and design elements

description: A red field bearing the badge of the City of Adelaide centred — a stylised crown over a wreath and lettering identifying the City of Adelaide.
history: The flag of the City of Adelaide displays the corporate arms of the city (named after Queen Adelaide, consort of King William IV). Adelaide was the first South Australian municipality, incorporated in 1840.

features.role: Badge of the City of Adelaide
